title: Redis Streams Consumer Group
description: Schema for a Redis Streams consumer group configuration and state.

stream.description: The stream key this consumer group is attached to

last-delivered-id.description: The ID of the last entry delivered to the group

entries-read.description: Total number of entries read by the group (Redis 7.0+)

lag.description: Number of entries in the stream that are still waiting to be delivered (Redis 7.0+)

pel-count.description: Number of entries in the Pending Entries List (PEL)

consumers.description: List of consumers in this group

pending.description: Number of pending entries for this consumer

idle.description: Idle time in milliseconds since last interaction
